## Description (copy-paste)

```
Production-grade Swift networking — HTTP, WebSocket, subscriptions, downloads, streaming, uploads, and live VPN/network monitoring. Combine + async/await. Swift 5 & 6. iOS 13+.
```

## Extended About (for README / social)

**Simorgh** is a production-grade Swift networking library named after the mythical Persian firebird — a symbol of connection across realms. One SPM package covers every transport your app needs: REST APIs, file uploads, background downloads, HTTP streaming, raw WebSocket, Amplify-style subscription channels, and real-time network/VPN monitoring — all with dual Combine and async/await APIs and full Swift 6 strict-concurrency support.

Built for iOS, macOS, tvOS, and watchOS. MIT licensed.
